Terms of Service

Last updated: May 2026

Acceptance of Terms

By using TurfCalculator, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

Use of Service

TurfCalculator provides free online calculators for estimating lawn and turf material quantities. All results are estimates for informational purposes only.

You may use the calculators for personal, non-commercial purposes. You may not scrape, copy, or redistribute the content or tools without permission.

Accuracy Disclaimer

Calculator results are based on industry-standard formulas and average data. Actual material requirements may vary based on site conditions, supplier specifications, installation methods, and regional factors.

Always verify quantities with your local supplier before purchasing. TurfCalculator is not responsible for over- or under-purchasing resulting from these calculations.

Limitation of Liability

TurfCalculator is provided as-is without warranty of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our calculators, including but not limited to financial losses from incorrect material estimates.

Intellectual Property

All content, design, and code on TurfCalculator is the property of TurfCalculator. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our tools or content without written permission.

Changes to Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

Privacy Terms Disclaimer Cookies

© 2026 TurfCalculator. Free lawn calculators for everyone.
